errors.title: Error
errors.authSendFailedRetry: Failed to send verification code, please try again later
errors.networkCheckConnection: Please check your connection and try again
errors.smsCodeExpired: Code expired, please request a new one
errors.smsTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts, please request a new code
errors.networkCheckRetry: Network error, please check your connection and try again

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Quick sign-in with phone number
login.firstLoginHint: First-time sign-in will auto-register your account
login.phoneInvalidSimplified: Please enter a valid phone number
login.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to the

android.title: Android capability notes
android.body: This build ships the Android shell, LAN auto-discovery, basic pairing, and diagnostics export. QR pairing, the real upload queue, background reconnection, and incremental sync have not yet been ported to the Android native engine.

myDevice.label: My device name
myDevice.hint: This name will be shown on your Mac

photoPermission.title: Photo access is off
photoPermission.body: Allow access to Photos to keep auto-sync running.

switchDevice.title: Switch device
switchDevice.body: Disconnect from the current computer and switch to another device? You will need to enter a new pairing code.

resetSync.title: Reset all sync state
resetSync.body: This clears all sync records and disconnects the current device. You will need to re-enter a pairing code. Photos on your phone and Mac will not be deleted.

logout.title: Log out
logout.body: Are you sure you want to log out?

exportUnavailable.title: Cannot export
exportUnavailable.body: This build does not support exporting the diagnostics bundle.

exportFailed.title: Export failed
exportFailed.body: Failed to export the diagnostics bundle. Please try again later.

phases.reconcilingSubtitle: First-time setup: verifying previously uploaded files
phases.preparingSubtitle: Establishing a secure connection to your computer

running.autoRunningSubtitle: New photos will transfer to your PC automatically

standby.title: Waiting for new photos
standby.subtitle: New photos will transfer to your PC after you take them

notStarted.title: Auto upload is off
notStarted.subtitle: Turn on auto upload to sync after you shoot, or use manual upload

offline.title: Device is offline
offline.subtitle: Make sure your computer is on and on the same network. Once it's back, uploads and shared files will resume.

quickEntry.title: Quick actions
quickEntry.sharedFilesDesc: Browse shared files on your PC

expired.title: Trial ended
expired.subtitle: Subscribe to continue using photo upload, auto upload, and shared file access

cancelManual.title: Cancel manual upload
cancelManual.body: Cancel the current manual upload queue?

cancelManualFailed.title: Cancel failed
cancelManualFailed.body: Could not cancel the manual upload. Please try again later.

closeAuto.title: Turn off auto upload
closeAuto.body: Turning it off stops the current auto upload and new photos will not upload automatically.

closeAutoFailed.title: Action failed
closeAutoFailed.body: Could not turn off auto upload. Please try again later.

switchDevice.title: Switch device
switchDevice.body: This will disconnect the current device and return to the device discovery page.

enableAutoBlocked.title: Cannot enable
enableAutoBlocked.body: Please connect to a device first

switchUploadMode.title: Switch upload mode
switchUploadMode.body: An upload is in progress. Enabling auto upload will interrupt the manual upload. Continue?

enableAutoFailed.title: Action failed
enableAutoFailed.body: Could not enable auto upload. Please try again later.

performance.thermalThrottled: Device is running hot — transfer throttled

subtitle.ios: Scanning for desktop apps on your local network...
subtitle.android: Scanning for desktop apps on your local network. If no device is found, enter the IPv4 address manually.

emptyState.android: No devices found — enter the IP address manually to continue pairing

openLinkFailed.title: Cannot open
openLinkFailed.body: Could not open {{label}} right now. Please try again later.

manualInput.title: Enter IP to pair
manualInput.description: If the scan can't find your computer — especially Windows — enter the desktop app's IPv4 address directly.
manualInput.hint: Uses sync port 39393 by default. You'll still need to enter the 6-digit pairing code in the next step.
manualInput.ipError: Please enter a valid IPv4 address, e.g. 192.168.0.1

photosEmpty.title: No photos
photosEmpty.subtitle: No photos match the current filter

videosEmpty.title: No videos
videosEmpty.subtitle: No videos match the current filter

genericEmpty.title: No items
genericEmpty.subtitle: Make sure photo library access is granted

limitedAccess.title: No photos selected
limitedAccess.subtitle: Limited access mode — pick the photos you want to share

selectionHint.autoActiveLock: Auto upload is on — manual upload unavailable

summary.title: Auto upload is on
summary.subtitle: New photos will transfer to your PC automatically

cannotUpload.title: Cannot upload
cannotUpload.notConnected: Please connect to a device first

allDuplicate.title: All duplicates
allDuplicate.body: All {{count}} selected items are already in the upload queue
allDuplicate.body_one: The selected item is already in the upload queue
allDuplicate.body_other: All {{count}} selected items are already in the upload queue

submitFailed.title: Submission failed
submitFailed.body: Could not submit the upload. Please try again later.

closeAuto.title: Turn off auto upload
closeAuto.body: Turn off auto upload? New photos will stop transferring to your PC automatically.

closeAutoFailed.body: Could not turn off auto upload. Please try again.
